issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for export, import, or collaboration scenarios.

scenarios.name: Programmatic architecture diagram generation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented Excalidraw element shape with roughness, fontFamily:1, startBinding/endBinding, and seed for hand-drawn variation; baseline guesses generic JSON without proper bindings or element fields.

scenarios.name: Embedding Excalidraw with PNG export at retina scale
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses excalidrawAPI.getSceneElements/getFiles with exportToBlob and getDimensions for 2x scale plus explicit container height; baseline misses the API ref pattern and the getDimensions scale option.
